name: Sausage and Cornbread Cabbage Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the center vein of cabbage leaves, keeping each leaf intact.
2. Place the leaves in a shallow baking dish. Cover with vented clear plastic wrap.
3. Micro-cook, covered, on 100% power for 1 to 3 minutes or until the leaves are limp.
4. In a bowl, stir together egg, 1/4 cup chopped apple, stuffing mix, and 1 tablespoon Apple Juice or Cider. Add sausage; mix well.
5. Divide the meat mixture into two equal portions. Place one portion on each cabbage leaf.
6. Fold in the sides. Starting at the unfolded edge, roll up each leaf, ensuring folded edges are included in the roll.
7. Arrange rolls in a shallow baking dish. Pour water over the rolls. Cover with vented clear plastic wrap.
8. Micro-cook, covered, at 100% power for 9 to 10 minutes or until the meat is done (rotate the dish halfway after 5 minutes).
9. Transfer rolls to a plate. Cover and keep warm.
10. For sauce, in a 1-cup measure, stir together 3 tablespoons Apple Juice or Cider, cornstarch, and instant beef bouillon granules. Stir in the remaining chopped apple.
11. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 1 to 2 minutes or until the sauce is thickened and bubbly (stir every 30 seconds).
12. Spoon sauce over cabbage rolls and serve.
